chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D- 2252 of 2024 _________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge _________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 10226/24 (stay) 2. For hearing of main case. 18.10.2024. Mr. Umar Akhund, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, Advocate for respondents Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. ********* Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, Advocate has filed a statement duly signed by the Deputy Collector, Collectorate of Customs, Jinnah International Airport, Karachi; whereby, the impugned recovery Notices dated 15.12.2023 and 15.03.2024 issued to the Petitioner have been withdrawn. Same is taken on record. The purpose of filing of this petition has been served. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz
